'''鈭歜-v-dh''' ('''kabavadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zionify|zionify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-v-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zionify|zionify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-v-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kabavadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibavadh|thibavadh]] || [[word:jibavadh|jibavadh]] || [[word:shibavadh|shibavadh]] || [[word:kibavadh|kibavadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubavadh|thuthubavadh]] || [[word:jujubavadh|jujubavadh]] || [[word:shushubavadh|shushubavadh]] || [[word:kukubavadh|kukubavadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubavadh|thubavadh]] || [[word:jubavadh|jubavadh]] || [[word:shubavadh|shubavadh]] || [[word:kubavadh|kubavadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubavadh|thubavadh]] || [[word:jubavadh|jubavadh]] || [[word:shubavadh|shubavadh]] || [[word:kubavadh|kubavadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebavadh|thebavadh]] || [[word:jebavadh|jebavadh]] || [[word:shebavadh|shebavadh]] || [[word:kebavadh|kebavadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobavadh|thothobavadh]] || [[word:jojobavadh|jojobavadh]] || [[word:shoshobavadh|shoshobavadh]] || [[word:kokobavadh|kokobavadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobavadh|thobavadh]] || [[word:jobavadh|jobavadh]] || [[word:shobavadh|shobavadh]] || [[word:kobavadh|kobavadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobavadh|thobavadh]] || [[word:jobavadh|jobavadh]] || [[word:shobavadh|shobavadh]] || [[word:kobavadh|kobavadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bavadh|bavadh]] || [[word:bavadh|bavadh]] || [[word:bavadh|bavadh]] || [[word:bavadh|bavadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bavadh|bavadh]] || [[word:bavadh|bavadh]] || [[word:bavadh|bavadh]] || [[word:bavadh|bavadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bavadh|bavadh]] || [[word:bavadh|bavadh]] || [[word:bavadh|bavadh]] || [[word:bavadh|bavadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bavadh|bavadh]] || [[word:bavadh|bavadh]] || [[word:bavadh|bavadh]] || [[word:bavadh|bavadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bavadh|th忙bavadh]] || [[word:j忙bavadh|j忙bavadh]] || [[word:sh忙bavadh|sh忙bavadh]] || [[word:k忙bavadh|k忙bavadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabavadh|thathabavadh]] || [[word:jajabavadh|jajabavadh]] || [[word:shashabavadh|shashabavadh]] || [[word:kakabavadh|kakabavadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabavadh|thabavadh]] || [[word:jabavadh|jabavadh]] || [[word:shabavadh|shabavadh]] || [[word:kabavadh|kabavadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabavadh|thabavadh]] || [[word:jabavadh|jabavadh]] || [[word:shabavadh|shabavadh]] || [[word:kabavadh|kabavadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabavadh|shabavadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabavadh|goshabavadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabavadh|gokishabavadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabavadhn眉|shabavadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabavadhnkn眉|goshabavadhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabavadhn眉|gokishabavadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabavadhsh毛|shabavadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabavadhnksh毛|goshabavadhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabavadhsh毛|gokishabavadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabavadhro|shabavadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabavadhnkro|goshabavadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabavadhro|gokishabavadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabavadhmu|shabavadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabavadhnkmu|goshabavadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabavadhmu|gokishabavadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabavadhsher|shabavadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabavadhnksher|goshabavadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabavadhsher|gokishabavadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabavadhng|shabavadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabavadhnkng|goshabavadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabavadhng|gokishabavadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabavadhya|shabavadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabavadhnkya|goshabavadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabavadhya|gokishabavadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabavadhyam|shabavadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabavadhnkyam|goshabavadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabavadhyam|gokishabavadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabavadhn眉sh毛|shabavadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabavadhnkn眉sh毛|goshabavadhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabavadhn眉sh毛|gokishabavadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabavadhn眉ro|shabavadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabavadhnkn眉ro|goshabavadhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabavadhn眉ro|gokishabavadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabavadhn眉mu|shabavadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabavadhnkn眉mu|goshabavadhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabavadhn眉mu|gokishabavadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabavadhsh毛n眉|shabavadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabavadhnksh毛n眉|goshabavadhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabavadhsh毛n眉|gokishabavadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabavadhsh毛ro|shabavadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabavadhnksh毛ro|goshabavadhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabavadhsh毛ro|gokishabavadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabavadhsh毛mu|shabavadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabavadhnksh毛mu|goshabavadhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabavadhsh毛mu|gokishabavadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabavadhron眉|shabavadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabavadhnkron眉|goshabavadhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabavadhron眉|gokishabavadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabavadhrosh毛|shabavadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabavadhnkrosh毛|goshabavadhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabavadhrosh毛|gokishabavadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabavadhromu|shabavadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabavadhnkromu|goshabavadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabavadhromu|gokishabavadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabavadhmun眉|shabavadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabavadhnkmun眉|goshabavadhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabavadhmun眉|gokishabavadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabavadhmush毛|shabavadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabavadhnkmush毛|goshabavadhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabavadhmush毛|gokishabavadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabavadhmuro|shabavadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabavadhnkmuro|goshabavadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabavadhmuro|gokishabavadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
